calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029600
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference

Julianne M. Avery, Esq., MILLER NASH LLP 562.435.8002 julianne.avery@millernash.com Attorneys for Petitioners, UNIVERSITY OF OREGON; J. SMITH 1-6

J. Jonathan Hawk, Esq., MCDERMOTT WILL & EMERY LLP 310-277-4110 jhawk@mwe.com Attorney for Defendant X CORP.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONERS UNIVERSITY OF OREGON, J. SMITH 1, J. SMITH 2, J. SMITH 3, J. SMITH 4, J. SMITH 5, J. SMITH 6's Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029600 is granted. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in coplaince with CRC 3.1312, Approval as to Form, and e-mail the proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem. Andy Schwartz at schwartz@cmslaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029600
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Continued To Mar-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER UNIVERSITY OF OREGON, J. SMITH 1, J. SMITH 2, J. SMITH 3, J. SMITH 4, J. SMITH 5, J. SMITH 6's Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029600.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred and continued to March 25, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. to be heard on the court's discovery calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
